mano_cua.result_summary: 编辑器空白画布（图形加载代码被注释掉），无法通过UI加载图形测试autolayout。源码审查发现noflo-klay-interface.js中不存在portConstraints和FIXED_RATIO设置，节点构建时未设置任何端口约束属性。测试目标功能不可达。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Graph loading code in index.html is commented out (same as pr118). Source code review of noflo-klay-interface.js confirms: (1) No portConstraints property set on nodes. (2) No FIXED_RATIO anywhere in the codebase. (3) Port encoding only specifies portSide (WEST/EAST) but no constraint type. The autolayout button exists but has no effect on the empty canvas.
